description: CompositionGrey polo T-shirt with blue stripes, made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, contrast collar, buttoned chest placket, embroidered branding on the left chest and a vented hemFittingRegularWash careTurn inside out to wash, dry and ironMachine wash cold using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or dry flat in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsCrafted from soft cotton in a classic muted combination, this full sleeve polo neck T-shirt from lee is sure to become a winter wardrobe favourite. Pair it with jeans and sneakers, throw over a jacket, and you're all set to look fashionable in comfort in the chill.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight: 6'3", Shoulders: 19"
